answer_summary: Out here, the ground is often shallow, well-drained, loamy, carbonatic soil with a petrocalcic (caliche) layer, which is why we see small seasonal movement show up as door alignment drift, hairline cracking
speakable_summary: Out here, the ground is often shallow, well-drained, loamy, carbonatic soil with a petrocalcic (caliche) layer
